description_long: This is a life-sized adult male figure dressed in casual summer attire, featuring a short-sleeved shirt with a floral pattern and knee-length shorts with a subtle striped design. The figure stands upright with arms slightly extended away from the body, and the hands are relaxed at the sides. The shirt fits loosely, and the shorts end just below the knees, exposing the lower legs and feet. The figure is barefoot, with toes and heels clearly visible. The head is sculpted with short, neatly styled hair, and the facial features are neutral and calm. The overall build is average, with natural body proportions and a relaxed, everyday posture.
description: An adult male figure in casual summer clothing, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched and barefoot. The attire includes a floral-patterned shirt and knee-length striped shorts.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the floral shirt, shorts, and the back of the head and legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the shirt and shorts.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the facial features, front of the shirt, shorts, and both feet.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the shirt and shorts.
attribute_clothing_type: short-sleeved casual shirt and knee-length shorts
